summary: Otto Haai Wanas and others are struggling to remember the past as they try to come to terms with a powerful magical phenomenon that has awakened. Meanwhile, Otton declares war on the traitor who betrayed House Inger's glory and tries to restore it.
key_moments: Otto awakens once more, possibly due to some external influence
Otto struggles to remember his past as a powerful entity
Otto declares war on the traitor of House Inger
characters_present: Him (presumably a member of House Inger)
